pillars.name: HBM demand growth
pillars.description: HBM capacity expansion driven by AI training/inference memory bandwidth needs
pillars.key_indicators: HBM pricing, SK Hynix/Samsung HBM revenue, NVIDIA GPU attach rates
pillars.intact_signal: HBM pricing stable or rising, capacity sold out 2+ quarters ahead
pillars.invalidation_signal: HBM demand peaks, pricing collapses >30%, or major cancellations

pillars.name: Hyperscaler capex trajectory
pillars.description: MSFT/GOOG/AMZN/META sustaining or increasing AI infrastructure spend
pillars.key_indicators: Quarterly capex guidance, datacenter lease commitments, GPU order backlog
pillars.intact_signal: Capex guides up or flat, no major project cancellations
pillars.invalidation_signal: Two or more hyperscalers cut capex guidance >15% in same quarter

pillars.name: CXMT competitive threat contained
pillars.description: Chinese DRAM competitor CXMT remains 2+ generations behind on leading-edge
pillars.key_indicators: CXMT node progress, yield rates, product mix, sanctions effectiveness
pillars.intact_signal: CXMT stuck at DDR4/LP5 equivalent, no HBM capability
pillars.invalidation_signal: CXMT ships HBM3-equivalent or captures >10% DRAM market share

pillars.name: Memory cycle positioning
pillars.description: DRAM/NAND cycle in upcycle or early-mid innings, not late-cycle oversupply
pillars.key_indicators: Spot vs contract pricing, inventory days, bit shipment growth vs demand
pillars.intact_signal: Contract prices rising, inventory below 5-year average
pillars.invalidation_signal: DRAM spot prices decline >20% from peak with rising inventory

pillars.name: AI revenue materialization
pillars.description: AI workloads generating real revenue for infrastructure providers, not just hype
pillars.key_indicators: NVDA datacenter revenue growth, cloud AI inference revenue, enterprise adoption
pillars.intact_signal: Datacenter revenue growing >30% YoY, inference revenue emerging
pillars.invalidation_signal: Datacenter revenue growth decelerates below 15% YoY for two consecutive quarters
